# OriginX AI Blog

## About
OriginX AI helps enterprises deploy AI voice agents and automation systems. This blog covers AI voice agents, automation strategies, cost comparisons, and implementation guides for business decision-makers.

## Author
Fahad Rahman — Founder, OriginX AI
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fahadrahman9/

## Topics
- AI Voice Agents (cost analysis, platform comparisons, implementation)
- AI Automation (enterprise workflows, lead automation, CRM integration)
- Industry Playbooks (real estate, healthcare, insurance, finance)
- AI Tools & Reviews (Retell AI, Vapi, GoHighLevel, n8n)
- AI Strategy (ROI frameworks, build vs buy, scaling operations)

## Content Format
Long-form technical articles (2,000-4,000 words) with data tables, cost comparisons, and actionable implementation steps. Each article includes FAQ sections and answer capsules for quick reference.
